title: psychotria commutata
intro: Psychotria commutata, also known as Wild Coffee or Mountain Coffee, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria commutata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
